rose_audit: Rose audit: blocker wording is route-specific and cannot be read as animal q1 mu support closure.
fisher_review: Fisher review: SR475 fit/pdHess counts do not override endpoint-profile upper misses against truth 0.55, so the route cannot be promoted.
gauss_review: Gauss review: tmbprofile is a negative fallback and endpoint profiles expose an interval-shape blocker rather than numerical admission.
noether_review: Noether review: the decision applies only to direct sd:mu animal(1 | id) intercept evidence, not q1 sigma, matched mu+sigma, q2, q4, q8, or derived correlations.
grace_review: Grace review: evidence remains host-labelled as Nibi SR475 plus local hard-seed profile replay and cannot be pooled into a new denominator claim.
curie_review: Curie review: no top-up is useful until a new interval route asks a different simulation question.
